parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.model, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.userText }], stream: false }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ response_type: 'in_channel', text: ($json.route === 'studio_image' ? ':art: Generating your image in *#studio-canvas*...' : $json.route === 'studio_video' ? ':movie_camera: Generating your video in *#studio-reels*...' : $json.route === 'studio_enhance' ? ':sparkles: Enhancing your image...' : ':newspaper: Fetching top articles...') }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ response_type: 'ephemeral', text: ':memo: Got it! Analyzing your request and creating a Linear issue...' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ response_type: 'ephemeral', text: ':triangular_ruler: *Generating 3D model* for: _' + $json.description + '_\nI\'ll post the results in this channel shortly.' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ response_type: 'ephemeral', text: ':page_with_curl: *Generating patent specification* for: _' + $json.description + '_\nThis may take 1-2 minutes. Results will appear in this channel.' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ response_type: 'ephemeral', text: ':mag: Fetching and summarizing that page...' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ response_type: 'ephemeral', text: ':pencil: Jason is reviewing your code...' }) }}
